name: Nigeria

assets.notes: Circle USDC on Stellar — primary deposit asset
MoneyGram MGUSD — launched June 2026. TODO (wave:trivial): update issuer address once confirmed on mainnet.

bankingPartner.name: TBD — requires local Nigerian EMI or licensed PSSP
bankingPartner.notes: TODO (wave:medium): Identify and onboard a CBN-licensed PSSP for NGN settlement. Options: Paystack, Flutterwave, Grey Finance.

limits.notes: CBN forex limits apply. Individual daily FX limit $10,000 USD equivalent.

regulatoryNotes: CBN (Central Bank of Nigeria) regulates forex transactions. Lumex must partner with a licensed FX dealer or PSSP. Users subject to BVN (Bank Verification Number) requirements for KYC TIER_2+.
